description: The ScreenModeController component is used to control the interactions of the user within user space also known as the dash world.

fields._dash: The dash of the dash world.
fields._muteSound: The audio clip to play when the user mutes themselves.
fields._unmuteSound: The audio clip to play when the user unmutes themselves.
fields._startTalkSound: The audio clip to play when the user starts to record a voice message.
fields._stopTalkSound: The audio clip to play when the user stops recording a voice message.
